title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Cashfree

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Cashfree
jsonLd.description:
We at Cashfree are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cashfree:
Cashfree is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree!
